items.title: Jerry Gogosian Dies at 40
items.summary: News about Hilde Lynn Helphenstein’s sudden death shocked the art world.

items.title: Hilde Lynn Helphenstein of “Jerry Gogosian” Found Dead in Brazil
items.summary: The curator and commentator built a following for her online persona and satirical memes of the art world.

items.title: Kingston Locals Can't Stand City's “Soulless” New Signage
items.summary: New site markers installed in the Hudson River Valley city last month have been decried as “bland,” “ugly,” and “sterile slop.”

items.title: Why Your Shelf Looks Like a Gallery
items.summary: Plus a book about an infamous art trafficker, an Anni Albers bio, and more.
